config.indexing.enabled_desc: Enables automatic file indexing. Files in configured folders are converted to embeddings and available to the agent as knowledge.
config.indexing.images: Images (analyzed via Vision LLM, when enabled)
config.indexing.poll_help: How often to check for changed files (default: 60s).
config.indexing.index_images_desc: When enabled, image files (.jpg, .png, .gif, .webp, .bmp) are sent to the Vision LLM. The image analysis is stored with filename and path in the embeddings.
config.indexing.image_notice_desc: Image analysis via Vision LLM can cause significant API costs when indexing many images. Each image is sent individually to the LLM and generates token costs. Recommendation: Only index folders with relevant images.
